chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1306 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for petitioner. Syed Imtiaz Ahmed Shah Jillani, Advocate for respondents / Market Committee, Gambat. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A cheque of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac), submitted by learned Counsel for respondents / Market Committee, Gambat, has been given to the petitioner. However, a statement has been filed that Market Committee is going to lease out plots and where after entire amount of the petitioner on account of his pensionary benefits would be paid to him within three months. Accordingly, petitioner and his Counsel are satisfied, and this petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
